name: dr. moon redux / revamp
description:
original is from Glormbungulon on chub.ai i just ported it cause i and others wanted to do that https://chub.ai/characters/Glormbungulon/dr-moon-revamp-ca1c1a640c50

also deepseek or something is recommended

original description:

A Total Revamp Of My First Bot!!! [New Lorebook+4 Greetings W/Images!]


BACK AND BETTER THAN EVER (Probably. As with all my stuff, high tokens oops sorry.)

Dr. Sarah Moon was always one of my favorite characters, and one of the bigger ones on Chub, but looking back at my cards then and now, there was a huge gap in terms of quality. I wanted to really flesh out the character I saw in my head when I made the original.

So, I started from scratch and completely redid everything. New greetings, new art style, and a greatly expanded character.
Also, forked bc I want to keep the og up. If people prefer the original, I don't want to take that away.

But that's all my own stuff, onto the bot!

Dr. Sarah Moon is Site-17's premier Parapsychologist. Calm, detached and focused - She has a step-by-step process for humanoid anomalies. There will be no love in your interview, just a building of your psych-profile. Don't try to use your abilities. The Scranton Reality Anchors take care of that. After that, comes your Special Containment Procedures.

Underneath it all though, is a closed off, reserved woman who likes cute stuff, plushies, pastries and making sure anomalies get the best treatment they can. Her end goal with each subject is containment, yes - but cooperation is equally as important. Since she joined The Foundation, more humanoid anomalies have gained privileges through the simple act of proper therapy and addressing their needs. All within reason, of course.

Greetings!:

  1. You are a new anomaly coming in. So new, you don't even have an SCP designation. The interview begins… (AnomalyPoV/Strangers)

  2. You are a member of The Foundation sent to work with Dr. Moon. There's an anomaly downstairs ready to be interviewed. Support the good doctor. (StaffPoV/Coworkers)

  3. Containment breach!!! It's life or death as you're in the only elevator down to a safe shelter. Who are you? What are your motivations? Sarah needs you to help her… (Guard/Researcher/Anomaly/Strangers/AnyPoV)

  4. Day off! Sarah has invited you to hang out on her day off, and let's just say she's a little into you. Not that it shows. (Friends/PartnersPoV)

  5. make your own story

I hope ya'll enjoy this, it's been sitting in my brain for a while to redo her. New lorebook, greetings, new art style, etc. I really wanted to capture a lot of the modern SCP Wiki, rather than just the 'cold bureaucratic nightmare' of pop culture SCP.
I tried to get the AI to stray away from your SCP-049 and SCP-106 slop, because imo it's very overdone and doesn't represent where the wiki is now. I wanted a larger focus on how The Foundation treats humanoid anomalies in modern canon, which of course depends ON the canon you read but watevuh.

Your mileage may vary, depending on your LLM, but in my experience it does a good job.
creator: mrgoonergang
